rulings.Case Title: MIREYA THUMAS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 18, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT REGIONAL SERVICE CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Plaintiff's untimely opposition is stricken. Demurrer sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer, including but not limited to tolling, Res Judicata, and preemption. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIREYA THUMAS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY VERMILLION VS. MARGARITA MORENO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 18, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANTS CESAR CONTRERAS and PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar, dismissal of 8th cause of action as to moving party filed on January 9, 2013. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GITLOW INVESTORS, LLC VS. SURESH PATEL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 18, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF GITLOW INVESTORS,LLC's MOTION For Preliminary Injunction. Hearing required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RICK UNG VS. CARLOS ALEMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 18, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANTs CARLOS ALEMAN and VICTORIA VEGA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Grant- striking paragraph 17(f) seeks improper daily damages. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEL MATTERA FAMILY PARTNERSHIP, L.P. VS. HOLLY GOODIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 18, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT HOLLY GOODIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule - 5 days to answer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN MENA VS. IVAN GUTIERREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 18, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT IVAN GUTIERREZ'a MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny. 5 days to answer paragraph 24 of lease and its limitations are incorporated by reference =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PREFERRED REALTY ADVISORS, INC. VS. CHRISTOPHER SHEPHERD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 18, 2013, line 7 - DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER SHEPHERD's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Grant, subject to opposition. No proof of service on file. =(501/REQ)
